discover_cards.title: Winterizing Your Fresh Water System
discover_cards.summary: Before temps drop below freezing, flush and protect your lines.

discover_cards.title: Burns Run East — Lake Texoma, OK
discover_cards.summary: Direct lake access on the Striper Capital of the World. Open year-round. 44 electric & water sites, swimming beach, boat ramp.

discover_cards.title: Burns Run West — Lake Texoma, OK
discover_cards.summary: 117 sites with a beautiful tree canopy in Section C. Trails, beach, and world-class striped bass fishing on Lake Texoma.

discover_cards.title: Twin Coves Park — Flower Mound, TX
discover_cards.summary: Hidden gem on Grapevine Lake. Immaculate park with full hookups, 22-mile Northshore Trail, kayak rentals, and outstanding staff.

discover_cards.title: Lake Ouachita State Park — Arkansas
discover_cards.summary: The cleanest lake in Arkansas. 58 full hookup sites on 975 miles of pristine shoreline. Perfect base for exploring Hot Springs.

discover_cards.title: Buzzard's Roost — Lake Murray, OK
discover_cards.summary: Rough road in, lake at your feet. Lakefront sites at one of Oklahoma's most scenic state parks. Tucker Tower views are unforgettable.

discover_cards.title: Pilot Knoll Park — Highland Village, TX
discover_cards.summary: Beautiful lakefront park on Lake Lewisville with city conveniences next door. Great wildlife, hiking, and equestrian trails.
